notes: ATTEMPTED, structural mismatch. country=Japan; source_url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/watch/okotoba/imperial-family01/addresses/; region=Asia; iso3n=392; source_type=official_gov; content_format=fulltext | Imperial Household Agency (Emperor Naruhito, ceremonial). The Emperor's addresses ('おことば') live under /watch/okotoba/imperial-family01/ (family01=天皇ご一家; family03=Akishino, a different person). STRUCTURAL PROBLEM for the one-URL-one-row engine: each okotoba page BUNDLES a WHOLE YEAR of addresses (e.g. .../addresses/ceremony2026.html = '令和8年' with many dated addresses concatenated), and dates are Reiwa/Heisei era in prose (令和8年2月20日). A standard recipe would emit one coarse row per year (multiple speeches, year-only date) - would need a custom per-address splitter + era-date parser. The higher-value Japan HEAD-OF-GOVERNMENT source (PM) IS delivered as jpn_kantei. Recommend prioritizing kantei; kunaicho needs an engine splitter to do properly.
